title: vicia ferreirensis
intro: Vicia ferreirensis, also known as Iberis, is a plant species in the genus Vicia and is a type of vetch. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vicia ferreirensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Vicia ferreirensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
